channel.title: Desktop Development on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Desktop Development on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio

item.title: Sudoku
item.description:
This implementation of sudoku is a cross-platform game written in Flutter where a 9x9 grid is filled in with the numbers 1-9, and conflicts must be avoided.

Being my first Flutter project and first cross-platform game, I wrote this to learn a lot about different development platforms, a new language, and new programming skills.

item.title: Java Sudoku
item.description: A desktop Java application I wrote in college to teach myself AWT/Swing (along with the Tic-Tac-Toe Java program). It features a 9x9 grid and 4 difficulties. A player can erase their inputs, get hints, or reset the board.

item.title: Java Tic Tac Toe
item.description: A desktop Java application I wrote in college to teach myself AWT/Swing (along with the Sudoku Java program). It features a 3x3 grid. It can be played 2-player, or against an AI, with 4 difficulties. A player can erase their inputs and start over.
